Introduction
    During a chaotic period towards the end of the Tang Dynasty, Qi Xue (Li Yi Tong) was sold to a brothel by her own father. She gets a second chance after inadvertently entering a mysterious city where she was given the name Wan Mei...

Filming locations: Hengdian World Studios, Dongyang, Jinhua, Zhejiang Province, China
